titleStmt.title: SII 5.1205: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1205. (A.R. No. 324 of 1896). ON THE TWENTY-FOURTH PILLAR IN THE SAME MANDAPA, EAST FACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śākābdē ravibāṇasāgarayutē pauṣādiśuklē dinē vīraśrī
varabhānudēvanṛpatiḥ śrīkū¨rmmanāthaya hi . vīraśrīnarasihyadēva
nṛpatēśchāyāṁca gaṁgāṁbikā (.) cchāyāṁ dīpakaḷādharā¨rppitakarāṁ prādā
ptratāpōnnataḥ . vīraśrībhānudēvasya prava¨rddhamānavijayarājyatṛtī
yāṁkkē makarasthēravau pauṣē śuklapratipadi bhṛguvārē śrīmatē kū
¨rmmanāthāya śrīvīrabhānudēvanṛpatiḥ svābhīṣṭhāvāptayē niraṁ
tarākhaṁḍapradīpaprajvalanāya Ēkaikadinaṁprati bhōgapurē Ā
ḍadvayagavyaghṛtapradāpanāya Ēṟadavisayē tōṭigrāmē vrīhibhū
mimadyē Adarāmākhē vāṭikatraiyyaṁ māṇadvayaṁ Āḍadvaya
ṁcca catu¨rdikṣu suda(ri)¨rśanāṁkitaśilāpratiṣṭhāpanaṁ kṛtvā ka
ḷiṁgaparīkṣasya purusōttamajiyyanasya vevaraṇakālē bhōgapa
rīkṣakasya nārāyaṇamahāsēnāpatiradhikārē dvāranāyakasya kēśava
nāthapaṁḍḍitasya hasthē Ājñapurasvaraṁ Ācaṁdrā¨rkkadattaṁ Ētat
dīpaprajvalanaṁ kāḷiṁganāyakaiḥ karaṇīyyaṁ Idaṁ śrīkā¨ryyajātaṁ śrī
vaiṣṇavajanaissaṁrakṣaṇīyyamiti śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 5.1205 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
